title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.660 - Contracts to be executed through attorney in fact
text:
379.660.  Contracts to be executed through attorney in fact. — The contracts may be executed by an attorney in fact, herein designated attorney, duly authorized and acting for the subscribers, and the attorney may be a corporation.  The office or offices of the attorney, herein defined as an exchange, may be maintained at such places as may be designated by the subscribers in the power of attorney.
(RSMo 1939 § 6079, A.L. 1967 p. 516) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5967; 1919 § 6375
